name: RxSight, Inc.
summary: RxSight, Inc. is a commercial-stage medical technology company focused on customized vision correction following cataract surgery. Its proprietary RxSight system is the first and only commercially available premium cataract technology enabling post-surgical vision customization. The system comprises the Light Adjustable Lens (LAL/LAL+), the Light Delivery Device (LDD), and accessories. The LAL is a photosensitive silicone-based intraocular lens adjusted via UV light patterns from the LDD to optimize patient visual outcomes after implantation.
